admin.start_text:
👋 **Welcome to {bot_name}**

I am an advanced management system engineered to automate, secure, and moderate your Telegram communities effortlessly.

To begin, add me to your group or channel as an administrator. Use the dashboard below to explore my features and configure your chats.
admin.unpinned_all: ✅ All pinned messages have been unpinned.
ai.context_cleared: 🧹 Memory cleared for this chat. Mention me if you need me again!
ai.context_too_large: 📦 **Context Too Large**: The conversation history is too big for this model. Try /clear_context.
ai.error_entity_too_large: 📦 **Request Entity Too Large**: The prompt or image is too big.
ai.model_decommissioned: ⚠️ **Model Decommissioned**: The selected AI model is no longer supported by the provider. Please select a new model in the **Admin Panel -> AI Assistant -> Select Model**.
ai.rate_limit: 🐢 **Rate Limit Reached**: Please wait {seconds} before trying again.
ai.session_closed: 💤 Chat session closed and context cleared. Mention me if you need me again!
allowlist.added: ✅ Channel `{channel_id}` has been added to the allowlist.
allowlist.empty: No channels are whitelisted in this group.
allowlist.limit_reached: ❌ **Limit Reached!** You can only have up to 50 whitelisted channels per group.
allowlist.not_found: ❌ Channel ID not found in the allowlist.
allowlist.removed: ✅ Channel `{channel_id}` has been removed from the allowlist.
approval.limit_reached: ❌ **Limit Reached!** You can only have up to 1000 approvals per group.
approval.list_empty: No approved users in this group.
blacklist.err_already_exists: ❌ This pattern is already in the blacklist.
blacklist.limit_error: ❌ Limit of 200 blacklist patterns reached for this group.
blacklist.limit_reached: ❌ **Limit Reached!** You can only have up to 200 blacklist patterns per group.
captcha.image_prompt: Hello {mention}, please tap the {target} icon that is circled in the image below:
captcha.locked: ❌ You already failed this captcha. You cannot try again.
captcha.math_prompt:
Hello {mention}, please solve this problem to get write permission:

`{problem}`
captcha.message:
🚨 **CAPTCHA Verification** 🚨

Welcome {mention}! Please verify that you are human before you can speak.
captcha.not_for_you: ❌ This button is not for you!
captcha.poll_explanation: Please select the correct answer to verify you are not a bot.
captcha.success: ✅ Verification successful! You can now speak.
captcha.wrong_choice: ❌ Wrong choice! Please look closer at the image.
captcha.wrong_choice_ban: ❌ Wrong choice! You have been banned for 24 hours.
captcha.wrong_choice_kick: ❌ Wrong choice! You have been kicked.
captcha.wrong_choice_mute: ❌ Wrong choice! You have been muted.
captcha.wrong_mode: This button is not for your current captcha mode.
channel_protect.antianon_on: ✅ Anonymous admin messages will be deleted.
common.err_access_denied: ❌ **Access Denied.** You do not have sufficient administrative privileges to manage this chat.
common.err_start_private: ❌ Please start me in private messages first.
connection.not_admin: ❌ You are not an admin in that group.
donate.invoice_desc: A contribution of {amount} stars to support development.
donate.stars_select_text: Select the amount of stars you wish to contribute:
donate.text:
Support the development of **{bot_name}**! Your contributions help keep the project alive and well-maintained.

Choose your preferred method below:
donate.thanks: Thank you for your generous donation of {amount} {currency}! Your support is greatly appreciated. 💖
entityblock.violation: 🚨 {mention} was **{action}** for sending a blocked **{type}** entity.
error.access_denied: ❌ Access denied. Please pick another group:
error.admin_no_permission: ❌ You don't have the required administrative permission for this action.
error.bot_no_permission: ❌ I don't have the required administrative permission to perform this action in this chat.
error.database_locked_msg: {bot_name} failed to start: The database is locked. This usually means another instance of the bot is already running.
error.no_membership_admin: ❌ You are not an admin here.
error.no_permission: ❌ I don't have permission to do that.
error.no_reply: ❌ Reply to a message or provide a username.
error.provide_user: ❌ Reply to a message or provide a username/ID.
error.target_is_admin: ❌ I cannot act on an admin.
federation.interceptor_banned: 🔨 Federation banned user {mention} tried to join. Kicked.
federation.left: ✅ This group has left its federation.
federation.not_joined: ❌ This group is not in a federation.
filter.err_already_exists: ❌ A filter with this keyword already exists.
filter.limit_reached: ❌ **Limit Reached!** You can only have up to 200 filters per group.
filter.list_empty: No filters are set in this group.
filter.stopall_done: ✅ All {count} filters have been removed from this group.
filter.stopall_empty: ❌ No filters are set in this group.
flood.set: 🌊 Flood control set to {threshold} msgs per {window}s → {action}.
gban.joined: ⚠️ Globally banned user {mention} tried to join. Kicked.
gban.ungban_success: ✅ {mention} has been removed from the global ban list.
help.admin_text:
👮 **Admin Commands**

• `/promote` — Give admin rights to a user
• `/demote` — Remove admin rights
• `/id` — Get user/chat IDs
• `/info` — Get user information
• `/chatinfo` — Get group details
• `/invitelink` — Export group invite link
help.antiflood_text:
🌊 **Anti-Flood**

Protect your group from mass-message spam.

• `/setflood <n>` — Set max messages allowed
• `/flood` — View current flood settings
help.antiraid_text:
🚨 **Anti-Raid**

Prevent botnets from joining your group.

• `/raid <on/off>` — Toggle raid protection
• `/raidtime <time>` — Lock group for specific duration
help.approval_text:
✅ **Approval**

Approve users to bypass bot restrictions.

• `/approve` — Approve a user
• `/unapprove` — Remove approval
• `/approved` — List all approved users
help.bans_text:
🚫 **Bans & Mutes**

• `/ban` — Ban a user
• `/unban` — Unban a user
• `/mute` — Mute a user
• `/unmute` — Unmute a user
• `/kick` — Kick a user
help.blacklist_text:
🚫 **Blacklist**

Block specific words or patterns.

• `/addblacklist <pattern>` — Add to blacklist
• `/rmblacklist <pattern>` — Remove from blacklist
• `/blacklist` — List active patterns
help.captcha_text:
🤖 **CAPTCHA**

Verify new members before they can speak.

• `/captcha <on/off>` — Toggle CAPTCHA
• `/captchamode <mode>` — Set verification type (Image/Math/Poll)
help.cleancmd_text:
🧹 **Clean Commands**

Automatically delete command trigger messages to keep the chat clean.

• `/cleancmd <on/off>` — Toggle command cleaning
help.cleansvc_text:
🧹 **Clean Service**

Delete noisy service messages (joined/left/pinned).

• `/cleansvc <on/off>` — Toggle service cleaning
help.connections_text:
🔗 **Connections**

Manage group settings from your PM.

• `/connect <chat_id>` — Connect to a group
• `/disconnect` — Terminate connection
help.disabling_text:
🔕 **Disabling**

Disable specific bot commands in your group.

• `/disable <command>` — Disable a command
• `/enable <command>` — Enable a command
help.federations_text:
🏰 **Federations**

Shared ban lists across multiple groups.

• `/newfed <name>` — Create a federation
• `/joinfed <id>` — Join a federation
• `/fban` — Federation-ban a user
help.filters_text:
📋 **Filters**

Automated replies to specific keywords.

• `/filter <word> <reply>` — Set a filter (quote multi-word triggers)
• `/stop <word>` — Remove a filter
• `/stopall` — Remove all filters
• `/filters` — List active filters
help.formatting_text:
✨ **Formatting**

Manage message styling and media IDs.

• `/id` — Get media file IDs for use in notes/welcomes
help.greetings_text:
👋 **Greetings**

Welcome new members or say goodbye.

• `/setwelcome <text>` — Set welcome message
• `/setgoodbye <text>` — Set goodbye message
help.impexp_text:
📥 **Import/Export**

Backup and restore group settings.

• `/export` — Get a settings backup file
• `/import` — Restore settings from backup
help.languages_text:
🌐 **Languages**

Change the bot's interface language.

• `/setlang <lang>` — Set group language
help.locks_text:
🔒 **Locks**

Restrict message types for everyone.

• `/lock <type>` — Lock a type (sticker, gif, etc.)
• `/unlock <type>` — Unlock a type
help.logging_text:
📝 **Logging**

Send moderation logs to a private channel.

• `/setlog` — Set the current channel for logs
• `/unsetlog` — Disable logging
help.main_text:
📖 **Help & Commands Menu**

Welcome to the help center. Select a category below to explore available commands and configuration options for each module.
help.misc_text:
🎲 **Misc**

Fun and utility commands.

• `/slap` — Slap someone
• `/shrug` — ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
• `/runs` — Run away!
help.notes_text:
📝 **Notes**

Save and retrieve snippets easily.

• `/save <name>` — Save a new note
• `/get <name>` or `#name` — Retrieve a note
help.pin_text:
📌 **Pin**

• `/pin` — Pin the replied message
• `/permapin` — Pin and notify everyone
• `/unpin` — Unpin current message
help.privacy_text:
🔐 **Privacy**

• `/privacy` — View our privacy policy and data usage terms.
help.purges_text:
🗑️ **Purges**

Mass-delete messages from the chat.

• `/purge` — Delete from replied message to current
help.reports_text:
📢 **Reports**

Let users report spam to admins.

• `/report` — Report a message for review
• `/reports <on/off>` — Toggle reporting
help.topics_text:
🏗️ **Topics**

Manage forum topics and organization.

• `/topic` — Get current topic info
langblock.violation: 🚨 {mention} was **{action}** for sending a message in a blocked language ({lang}).
language.group_picker_header:
👥 **Group Language**
Choose the default language for this group's features and messages.
language.onboarding_picker_header:
👋 **Welcome!**

I've detected your language from your Telegram settings. Please confirm your preferred language below to continue.
language.picker_header:
🌐 **Select Language**
Choose your preferred language for this chat.
language.search_prompt: 🔎 Send a language name or code (e.g. `en`, `english`).
language.user_picker_header:
👤 **My Language**
Choose your personal interface language for private messages.
misc.about_text:
🌐 **{bot_name} Advanced Group Manager**

A premium, high-performance Telegram moderation system built for precision and speed.

🛡️ **Version**: `{version}`
👨‍💻 **Developer**: {dev_name}
📂 **Repository**: [GitHub]({repo_url})

📚 **Tech Stack**:
{tech_stack}

{bot_name} is designed to manage large-scale groups with zero latency and absolute reliability.
misc.run_1: runs to the other side of the room.
misc.run_3: runs to hide under the bed.
note.limit_reached: ❌ **Limit Reached!** You can only have up to 1000 notes per group.
note.list_empty: No notes saved in this group.
note.start_private: ❌ Please start me in private first.
panel.access_denied_repick: Access denied. Please start me in private first.
panel.admin_refresh_success: ✅ Admin list has been synchronized with Telegram.
panel.ai_ctx_cleared: ✅ AI memory for this chat has been cleared.
panel.ai_guard_enable_first: ⚠️ Please enable the main AI Guard first!
panel.ai_guard_key_required: ❌ **Key Required!** Please set a Groq API key before enabling the AI Guard.
panel.ai_guard_key_set: ✅ AI Guard API key set successfully!
panel.ai_guard_setup_guide:
🛡️ **AI Guard Setup Guide**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
To activate {bot_name}'s advanced AI protection, follow these steps:

1️⃣ Visit [Groq Console](https://console.groq.com) and generate an API key.
2️⃣ Click the **🔑 Set API Key** button and paste your key.
3️⃣ Choose your preferred **Action** (Delete, Warn, Mute, or Ban).
4️⃣ Toggle **🛡️ Text Guard** or **Media Guard** to **ON** to start protecting.

✨ The system will use a powerful {model} model to keep your group clean.
panel.ai_invalid_api:
❌ **API Validation Failed!**
Please check your API key and Model ID for {provider}.
panel.ai_select_model_text:
📦 **Select AI Model**
Choose an optimized model for **{provider}** or enter a custom ID.
panel.blacklist_blocks_text:
📦 **Default Bad Word Blocks**
Choose a severity level to inject into your chat's blacklist. This will help you quickly set up protection against common offensive words.
panel.blacklist_inject_error: ❌ Partial injection: {success} added, {failed} failed (likely already existing or limit reached).
panel.blacklist_inject_success: ✅ Successfully injected {count} words from the {level} block into your blacklist.
panel.blacklist_limit_reached: ❌ **Limit Reached!** You can only have up to 200 blacklist patterns per group.
panel.blacklist_text:
🚫 **Blacklist Settings**
Manage blocked patterns. Supports literal, wildcard (`*`), and regex (`re:`) matching.
panel.channel_list_header:
📺 **My Channels**
Select a channel to manage its settings:
panel.channel_reactions_text:
🎯 **Reaction Control**
Manage automated post reactions for this channel.
panel.channel_settings_text:
📺 **Channel Control Center: {title}**
Tune how this channel behaves after each post.

✨ Reactions
🖊️ Signature
🖼️ Watermark
🔘 Buttons
🧹 Service cleaner
panel.channel_signature_text:
✍️ **Signature Control**
Manage automated post signatures for this channel.
panel.channels_list_title:
📺 **Your Channels**
Select a channel to configure automated rules.
panel.channels_text:
📺 **Channel Management Hub**
Manage connected channels where both you and the bot are admins.

💡 If a channel is missing, re-check admin permissions for both accounts.
panel.chat_list_header:
👥 **My Managed Groups**
Select a group to connect to:
panel.chat_not_admin: ❌ You are not an administrator in this chat.
panel.edit_filter_prompt:
✏️ Editing Filter: **{keyword}**

Enter the new keyword below:
panel.entity_block_updated:
✅ **Entity blocked:** {type} is now set to **{status}**
User actions will be handled accordingly.
panel.entityblock_text:
🏗️ **Message Blocking Settings**
Restrict specific message types like Stickers, GIFs, Forwards, or Links with automated penalties.
panel.error_cleaner_time_cooldown:
❌ **Cooldown Active!**
You can only change the cleaner run time once per day. Please try again tomorrow.
panel.error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
panel.error_not_admin: You are not an admin in that group.
panel.error_refresh_cooldown:
⏳ **Cooldown Active!**
You can only refresh the administrators list once per hour. Please try again later.
panel.filter_options_header:
🛠 **Filter Settings: `{keyword}`**

Configure how this filter should behave using the toggles below:
panel.filters_text:
📋 **Auto-Reply Filters**
Create smart keyword-based responses for FAQs, rules, and quick replies.

💡 Tip: You can also add filters in-chat using `/filter keyword`.
panel.general_text:
⚙️ **General Settings**
Customize the group's daily behavior and interface options.

🌐 Language
👋 Welcome/Goodbye
🧹 Service cleanup
panel.greetings_text:
👋 **Greetings & Filters**
Manage welcome messages, rules, and keyword filters to engage your members.
panel.groups_list_title:
👥 **Your Groups**
Select a group to configure its moderation and automation settings.
panel.input_invalid_time: ❌ Invalid time format! Please use HH:MM (e.g. 14:30).
panel.input_prompt_aiApiKey:
⌨️ **Set AI API Key**
Please enter your API key for {provider}.

**Note:** This will be stored securely and masked in the UI.
panel.input_prompt_aiInstruction:
⌨️ **Set AI Custom Instruction**
Enter persistent behavioral instructions for the AI (e.g., 'Always be concise', 'Respond as a helpful assistant').
panel.input_prompt_aiModelId:
⌨️ **Set AI Model ID**
Enter the model name you want to use (e.g. `gpt-4o`, `gemini-1.5-flash`, `claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620`).
panel.input_prompt_aiSystemPrompt:
⌨️ **Set AI System Prompt**
Enter the assistant's personality and instructions. This defines how the bot behaves.
panel.input_prompt_blacklistInput:
⌨️ **Add Blacklist Pattern**
Enter the word or pattern to block.

**Auto-Detection Examples**:
• `badword` — Literal
• `*badword*` — Wildcard
• `^cat.*$` — Regex

*Limit: 200 entries per group.*
panel.input_prompt_buttonsText:
⌨️ **Add New Button**
Enter the label and URL separated by a pipe (`|`).

Example: `Visit Site | https://google.com`
panel.input_prompt_captchaTimeout:
⌨️ **Captcha Timeout**
Enter the time in seconds a user has to solve the captcha before kick:
panel.input_prompt_cleanerInactive:
⌨️ **Inactive Days Threshold**
Enter the number of days a user must be offline to be considered inactive (e.g. `30`).

*Set to 0 to disable.*
panel.input_prompt_cleanerRunTime:
⌨️ **Cleaner Run Time**
Enter the time in HH:MM format for the group cleaner to run daily (e.g. `04:00`).

*Note: This can only be changed once per day.*
panel.input_prompt_entityblockInput:
⌨️ **Add Blocked Entity**
Enter the entity type you want to block:

`url`, `mention`, `hashtag`, `cashtag`, `email`, `phone`, `spoiler`, `poll`, `contact`, `location`
panel.input_prompt_filterKeyword:
⌨️ **New Filter Keyword**
Enter the keyword or phrase that should trigger the bot's response.
panel.input_prompt_filterResponse:
⌨️ **New Filter Response** (`{keyword}`)

Now send the message you want the bot to respond with. Supported types:

📝 **Formatted Text**
🖼️ **Media (Photos, Videos, GIFs)**
🎭 **Stickers & Animations**
📊 **Polls & Locations**

You can include captions with media.
panel.input_prompt_floodThreshold:
⌨️ **Flood Threshold**
Enter the new flood message limit (number):
panel.input_prompt_floodWindow:
⌨️ **Flood Window**
Enter the new flood time window in seconds (number):
panel.input_prompt_groqKey:
**⌨️ Set Groq API Key**
Please enter your API key from [Groq Console](https://console.groq.com).

*Note: This is used strictly for AI spam detection.*
panel.input_prompt_gsbKey:
⌨️ **Set GSB API Key**

To get your key:
1. Go to the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/safebrowsing.googleapis.com).
2. Enable the **Safe Browsing API**.
3. Go to **Credentials** and create an **API Key**.

Paste your key below:
panel.input_prompt_langblockInput:
⌨️ **Add Blocked Language**
Enter the language name or ISO code (e.g. `Russian`, `he`, `Arabic`):
panel.input_prompt_nightlockEnd:
⌨️ **Night Lock End Time**
Enter the time to disable the lock (e.g. `08:00`):
panel.input_prompt_nightlockStart:
⌨️ **Night Lock Start Time**
Enter the time to enable the lock (e.g. `22:00`):
panel.input_prompt_purgeMessagesCount:
🗑️ **Purge Messages**
Enter the number of messages to delete (1-100):
panel.input_prompt_raidActionTime:
⌨️ **Punish Duration**
Enter the temporary ban time for users joining during a raid (e.g. `1h`, `15m`):
panel.input_prompt_raidThreshold:
⌨️ **Raid Threshold**
Enter the amount of joins required to trigger raid mode:
panel.input_prompt_raidTime:
⌨️ **Raid Duration**
Enter the time for the raid mode to last (e.g. `3h`, `30m`):
panel.input_prompt_raidWindow:
⌨️ **Raid Window**
Enter the time window in seconds to track joins:
panel.input_prompt_reactions:
⌨️ **Set Automated Reactions**
Enter a list of emojis separated by spaces (e.g. 👍 ❤️ 🔥).
panel.input_prompt_reminderText:
⌨️ **New Reminder Message**

Send any message you'd like to schedule as a daily reminder. Supported types:

📝 **Formatted Text**
🖼️ **Media (Photos, Videos, GIFs)**
📊 **Interactive Polls**
📍 **Locations & Venues**
📄 **Documents & Audio**

Simply send your message now to proceed.
panel.input_prompt_reminderTime:
⌨️ **Reminder Time**
Enter the time in HH:MM format for this reminder to be sent daily (e.g. '14:30'):
panel.input_prompt_rulesText:
⌨️ **Rule Text**
Enter the new rules for this group. You can use standard formatting.
panel.input_prompt_signatureText:
⌨️ **Set Channel Signature**
Enter the text to append to all messages in this channel. Keep it short to avoid hitting Telegram's limits (Max 4096 text, 1024 captions).
panel.input_prompt_slowmode:
⌨️ **Slowmode Interval**
Enter the slowmode interval in seconds (0 to disable):
panel.input_prompt_stickerInput:
🎭 **Block Sticker Set**
Send a sticker or a link to the set you want to block, and its entire set will be added to the protection list.
panel.input_prompt_warnLimit:
⌨️ **Warn Limit**
Enter how many warnings until action is taken (number):
panel.input_prompt_watermarkText:
⌨️ **Set Watermark Text**
Enter the text to apply as a watermark to images in this channel (e.g. '@MyChannel').
panel.input_prompt_welcomeText:
⌨️ **Welcome Text**
Enter the new welcome message. You can use standard formatting and `{first_name}`, `{last_name}`, `{username}`, `{chat_name}`, `{mention}` placeholders.
panel.langblock_picker_text:
🗣️ **Select Languages to Block**
Choose the languages you want to restrict in this group.
panel.langblock_text:
🗣️ **Language Block Settings**
Restrict users from sending messages in specific languages.
panel.locks_text:
🔒 **Lock Settings**
Toggle which message types are allowed.
panel.logging_picker_text:
📣 **Log Channel Selection**

Click the button below to select a channel for bot logging. You must be an administrator in the selected channel, and the bot must be a member.
panel.main_text:
🛡️ **Admin Panel: {title}**
Welcome! Pick a section below to configure security, moderation, automation, and more.
panel.main_text_channel:
📺 **Channel: {title}**
Welcome to the moderation suite. Choose a category below to proceed.
panel.main_text_user:
👤 **Global Preferences**
Customize your personal bot interface and language settings.
panel.moderation_text:
⚖️ **Moderation & Enforcement**
Configure how violations are handled, manage warnings, and control the flow of the chat with automated tools.

⚠️ **Warns**: Set thresholds and penalties
🐌 **Slowmode**: Prevent message flooding
📝 **Logs**: Audit all admin actions
panel.my_chats_title:
🏠 **Admin Dashboard**
Select the type of chat you wish to manage.
panel.no_groups: ❌ You are not an admin in any groups where I am present.
panel.pick_chat:
🏙️ **Select a Chat**
Please select a chat to begin configuring its settings.
panel.pick_group:
🏙️ **Select a Group**
Please select a group to begin configuring its settings.
panel.promotion_notify:
🎊 **Congratulations!** You are now an administrator of **{title}**.

You can use the dashboard below to manage settings for this chat directly from here:
panel.redirect_pm_text:
⚙️ **Admin Panel**
Click the button below to manage this group's settings securely in your private chat.
panel.reminder_text:
⏰ **Daily Reminders**
Schedule recurring posts for rules, notices, and routine updates.

📌 Up to 3 reminder slots per chat.
panel.rules_text:
📜 **Rules Manager**
Control your rules message and whether users receive it in chat or private message.
panel.scheduler_text:
📅 **Automation & Scheduling**
Set up time-based tools that work automatically. Manage recurring reminders, nighttime restrictions, and align the bot with your local time.

⏰ **Reminders**: Send scheduled messages
🌙 **Night Lock**: Auto-mute during late hours
🌍 **Timezone**: Sync tasks with your local clock
panel.scheduler_text_channel:
📅 **Scheduler & Automation**
Manage time-based features like recurring reminders and local timezone settings.
panel.security_text:
🛡️ **Security & Protection**
Defend your community against automated attacks and spam waves. Configure multi-layered defenses to keep the chat safe.

🌊 **Flood**: Stop rapid message bursts
🚨 **AntiRaid**: Block bot invasion waves
🤖 **Captcha**: Verify new members
panel.security_text_channel:
🛡️ **Security Settings**
Manage URL scanning and advanced security features.
panel.service_cleaner_text:
🧹 **Service Message Cleaner**
Keep your chat feed clean by auto-removing Telegram service events.

✅ Use the master toggle to clean all service messages
⚙️ Or choose only specific types
panel.service_cleaner_types_text:
⚙️ **Manage Service Types (Page {page}/{total})**
Toggle the specific service message events you want to automatically clean from the chat.
panel.setting_not_allowed_for_type: ❌ This setting is not available for this type of chat.
panel.settings_text:
⚙️ **Core Configuration**
Manage the fundamental behavior of the bot in this group. Adjust language settings and coordinate administrative permissions.

🌐 **Language**: Set local interface
📣 **Logs**: Set audit channel
👮 **Admins**: Sync permissions
panel.shabbat_text:
🕯️ **Shabbat & Holiday Observance**
Automatically restrict chat activity during Shabbat and Jewish holidays to honor the sanctity of the day. The bot will manage lock and unlock times based on your local timezone.

**Status**: {status}
**Timezone**: `{timezone}`
panel.slowmode_text:
🐌 **Slowmode Control**
Limit how frequently members can send messages to reduce spam bursts.

Current Interval: {interval}s (0 = Off)
panel.stickers_text:
🎭 **Sticker Set Blocking**
Block entire sticker sets by their name. Send a sticker from a set to block it, or use the list to manage blocked sets.
panel.switch_chat: ✅ Switched to management for this chat.
panel.timezone_picker_text:
🌍 **Timezone Selection**

To ensure all scheduled tasks run at the correct time, please select your group's region and city.
panel.timezone_region_text:
🗺️ **Region: {region}**

Select a city from the list below:
panel.timezone_search_prompt:
🔍 **Search Timezone**

Please type the name of a city or country (e.g. `Jerusalem` or `London`).
panel.timezone_search_results_text:
🔍 **Search Results for: {query}**

Select the correct timezone from the results:
panel.timezone_text:
📅 **Timezone Settings**
Set your group's local timezone so reminders and automations trigger at the right time.

Current Timezone: `{timezone}`
panel.urlscanner_key_required: ❌ **Key Required!** Please set a Google Safe Browsing API key before enabling the scanner.
panel.urlscanner_text:
🔍 **URL Scanner Settings**
Protect your group from phishing and malicious links using Google Safe Browsing.

**Status**: {status}
**API Key**: `{key}`

**Make sure to provide a valid API key to use this feature.**
panel.user_warns_text:
👥 **Users With Active Warns**
Review members who currently have warning records in this chat.
panel.welcome_text:
👋 **Welcome & Goodbye**
Configure greeting messages and onboarding flow for new members.
panel.wm_video_limit_note: ℹ️ Max video size for watermark: {size_mb} MB
panel.wm_video_unavailable: Video watermark is disabled by the developer on this server.
privacy.main:
🔐 **Privacy Policy**

We respect your privacy. This bot does not collect any data that is not strictly necessary for its functionality (such as group settings and basic moderation logs).

The source code is fully transparent and available on GitHub. You can view more details, including the repository link, by using the /about command.
purge.confirm: ❓ This will delete all messages since that point. Proceed?
purge.usage: Reply to a message from where you want to start purging.
raid.action_time_updated: The AntiRaid action punish time has been updated to: {time}
raid.auto_disabled: Auto AntiRaid monitoring has been disabled.
raid.auto_enabled: Auto AntiRaid monitoring has been enabled. Threshold: {threshold} joins/min.
raid.current_action_time: The current AntiRaid action punish time is set to: {time}
raid.current_time: The current AntiRaid duration is set to: {time}
raid.detected: 🚨 Raid detected! Group has been locked.
raid.lifted: ✅ Raid protection lifted. Group is now unlocked.
raid.time_updated: The AntiRaid duration has been updated to: {time}
report.cooldown: ⏳ You can only report once every 5 minutes.
report.no_reply: ❌ Reply to a message you want to report.
report.sent: ✅ Your report has been forwarded to the admins.
rules.not_set: No rules have been set for this group yet.
rules.private_off: ✅ Rules will now be shown in chat.
rules.private_on: ✅ Rules will now be sent via DM.
rules.start_private: ❌ Please start me in private first.
scheduler.nightlock_engaged: 🌑 **Night Lock Engaged.** The group is now muted until morning.
scheduler.nightlock_lifted: ☀️ **Night Lock Lifted.** The group is now open.
scheduler.shabbat_lock_engaged:
🕯️ **Shabbat/Holiday Lock Enabled**
The group is now muted to honor the sanctity of the day. We wish everyone a peaceful and meaningful rest.
scheduler.shabbat_lock_lifted:
✨ **Shabbat/Holiday Lock Lifted**
The group is now open for messaging. Wishing everyone a successful and blessed week! Shavua Tov!
shabbat.not_configured:
⚠️ **Shabbat Lock is currently disabled**

You can enable this feature and configure your local timezone in the **Admin Panel -> Automation -> Shabbat Lock**.
shabbat.status_active:
🔒 **Shabbat Lock is Active**

The chat is currently in observance mode. It will automatically reopen at: `{unlock_time}` ({timezone}).
shabbat.status_inactive:
🔓 **Shabbat Lock is Inactive**

The chat is currently open. The next scheduled observance will begin at: `{lock_time}` ({timezone}).
stickers.err_already_blocked: ❌ This sticker set is already blocked.
stickers.err_not_in_set: ❌ This sticker doesn't belong to a set.
stickers.list_empty: No sticker sets are currently blocked.
stickers.not_found: ❌ Sticker set not found in block list.
stickers.reply_to_sticker: ❌ Please reply to a sticker to identify its set.
stickers.violation_notice: 🚨 {mention} was **{action}** for sending a sticker from a blocked set (`{set_name}`).
warn.cleared_all: ✅ Cleared all {count} warnings in this chat.
warn.limit_reached: ⚠️ {mention} has reached the warn limit and was {action}ed.
